ddls:
CREATE TABLE "algorithms" (
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each algorithm */,
  "algorithm_name" TEXT /* Name of the algorithm (e.g., k-means, hierarchical clustering) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of algorithm (e.g., clustering, regression) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the algorithm */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the algorithm was last updated */,
  "readme" TEXT /* Detailed documentation for the algorithm */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the algorithm is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the dataset */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., synthetic, real-world) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was last updated */,
  "readme" TEXT /* Detailed documentation for the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset */,
  "license" TEXT /* License information for the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configurations" (
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm the configuration belongs to */,
  "n" INTEGER /* Number of data points */,
  "d" INTEGER /* Number of dimensions */,
  "k" INTEGER /* Number of clusters */,
  "seed" INTEGER /* Random seed */,
  "subsample_size" REAL /* Subsample size */,
  "steps" INTEGER /* Number of steps */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the configuration was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the configuration is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("configuration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configurations_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm the result belongs to */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the result belongs to */,
  "L_slow" REAL /* Slowest execution time */,
  "L_fast" REAL /* Fastest execution time */,
  "L_diff" REAL /* Difference between slowest and fastest execution times */,
  "t_A" REAL /* Time taken for task A */,
  "t_B" REAL /* Time taken for task B */,
  "t_sketching" REAL /* Time taken for sketching */,
  "t_sampling" REAL /* Time taken for sampling */,
  "t_choose_best" REAL /* Time taken to choose the best solution */,
  "t_sampling_centroids" REAL /* Time taken to sample centroids */,
  "t_get_avg" REAL /* Time taken to get the average */,
  "t_permutation" REAL /* Time taken for permutation */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the result was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the result is active */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy metric for the result */,
  "f1_score" REAL /* F1 score for the result */,
  "precision" REAL /* Precision metric for the result */,
  "recall" REAL /* Recall metric for the result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_results_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date when the user last logged in */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON string containing user permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the result */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the result was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to access the result */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "algorithm_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "algorithm_id" INTEGER /* ID of the algorithm the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the version is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_algorithm_versions_algorithm_id FOREIGN KEY ("algorithm_id") REFERENCES algorithms ("algorithm_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the version is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "configuration_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "configuration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the configuration the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the version is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_configuration_versions_configuration_id FOREIGN KEY ("configuration_id") REFERENCES configurations ("configuration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "result_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "result_id" INTEGER /* ID of the result the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate if the version is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_result_versions_result_id FOREIGN KEY ("result_id") REFERENCES results ("result_id")
)
